meta.source: Ministry of Personnel Management (인사혁신처 / MPM) — 공무원봉급표 (authoritative, all 11 별표 appendices)
meta.status: AUTO-VERIFIED — 1611/1611 cells public-ready as of 2026-04-23. Last auto-fetch by kr:law-go-kr-political-judicial-v1.
meta.notes: Korean public officials are paid under 공무원 보수규정 (Presidential Decree) with 11 별표 (attached salary schedules) published annually by the Ministry of Personnel Management. Annual figures here are monthly base × 12. Bonuses (명절상여금 + 정근수당) add roughly 4-5 months of base across the year — modeled as an adjustment. Regional allowances and position-specific allowances (직급보조비, 직책수행경비) vary by posting.

헌법재판관 (Constitutional Court Justice — pay parity with 대법관). Source: 헌법재판소법 제15조. 2026 FY.
헌법재판소장 (President of the Constitutional Court — pay parity with Chief Justice). Source: 헌법재판소법 제15조; pay parity with 대법원장. 2026 FY.
대법원장 (Chief Justice of the Supreme Court of Korea). Source: 법관의 보수에 관한 법률 별표. 2026 FY.
지방법원장 (Chief Judge of a District Court). Source: 법관의 보수에 관한 법률 별표. 2026 FY.
고등법원장 (Chief Judge of a High Court). Source: 법관의 보수에 관한 법률 별표 (법관 최고 호봉). 2026 FY.
판사 1호봉 (Judge, entry — after 사법연수원 or 로스쿨 appointment). Source: 법관의 보수에 관한 법률 별표 1호봉. 2026 FY.
고법·지법 부장판사 (Presiding Judge, High/District Court). Source: 법관의 보수에 관한 법률 별표 17호봉. 2026 FY.
대법관 (Supreme Court Justice). Source: 법관의 보수에 관한 법률 별표. 2026 FY.
경찰·소방 (치안정감) — Police and Fire officers — 10 ranks from Superintendent General (치안정감/소방정감) down to Patrol Officer (순경/소방사).
경찰·소방 (순경) — Police and Fire officers — 10 ranks from Superintendent General (치안정감/소방정감) down to Patrol Officer (순경/소방사).
경찰·소방 (치안감) — Police and Fire officers — 10 ranks from Superintendent General (치안정감/소방정감) down to Patrol Officer (순경/소방사).
경찰·소방 (경무관) — Police and Fire officers — 10 ranks from Superintendent General (치안정감/소방정감) down to Patrol Officer (순경/소방사).
경찰·소방 (총경) — Police and Fire officers — 10 ranks from Superintendent General (치안정감/소방정감) down to Patrol Officer (순경/소방사).
경찰·소방 (경정) — Police and Fire officers — 10 ranks from Superintendent General (치안정감/소방정감) down to Patrol Officer (순경/소방사).
경찰·소방 (경감) — Police and Fire officers — 10 ranks from Superintendent General (치안정감/소방정감) down to Patrol Officer (순경/소방사).
경찰·소방 (경위) — Police and Fire officers — 10 ranks from Superintendent General (치안정감/소방정감) down to Patrol Officer (순경/소방사).
경찰·소방 (경사) — Police and Fire officers — 10 ranks from Superintendent General (치안정감/소방정감) down to Patrol Officer (순경/소방사).
경찰·소방 (경장) — Police and Fire officers — 10 ranks from Superintendent General (치안정감/소방정감) down to Patrol Officer (순경/소방사).
군인 (소장) — Military officers and NCOs — 13 ranks from Major General (소장) to Sergeant (하사).
군인 (원사) — Military officers and NCOs — 13 ranks from Major General (소장) to Sergeant (하사).

국회부의장 (Deputy Speaker of the National Assembly). Source: 국회의원수당 등에 관한 법률 (pay parity with 장관급). 2026 FY.
국회의원 (Member of the National Assembly). Source: 국회의원수당 등에 관한 법률 제1조 — 세비 + 수당 + 입법활동비. 2026 FY.
국회의장 (Speaker of the National Assembly). Source: 국회의장 공관 및 업무관련 법률; pay parity with 부총리 + allowances. 2026 FY.
부총리 (Deputy Prime Minister — Economy + Social Affairs). Source: 공무원보수규정 별표31. 2026 FY.
장관 (Cabinet Minister / 원장급) — includes Board of Audit, Prosecutor General, etc.. Source: 공무원보수규정 별표31. 2026 FY.
국무총리 (Prime Minister). Source: 공무원보수규정 별표31. 2026 FY.
대통령 (President of the Republic of Korea). Source: 공무원보수규정 별표31, 대통령령 제36147호 (시행 2026. 3. 1.). 2026 FY.
차관 (Vice Minister / 차관급). Source: 공무원보수규정 별표31. 2026 FY.
우정직군 (우정1급) — Postal service employees (Korea Post) — 우정1급-9급.

검찰총장 (Prosecutor General — pay parity with 장관). Source: 검찰청법 제13조; 공무원보수규정 별표31 장관급. 2026 FY.
부장검사 (Chief Prosecutor, mid-career 검사 17호봉). Source: 검사의 보수에 관한 법률 별표 17호봉. 2026 FY.
고검검사장 / 지검검사장 (High / District Prosecutor's Office Chief). Source: 검사의 보수에 관한 법률 별표 (senior 호봉). 2026 FY.

연구직 (연구관) — Research officials at government research institutes — 연구관 (researcher) / 연구사 (junior researcher).

전문경력관 (가군) — Specialized career officials — 가군/나군/다군 position groups for experts without traditional rank progression.

지도직 (지도관) — Teaching/supervisory officials — 지도관 (senior) / 지도사 (junior).
지도직 (지도사) — Teaching/supervisory officials — 지도관 (senior) / 지도사 (junior).
유·초·중·고 교원 — Kindergarten and K-12 teachers — single 호봉 progression 1-40.
국립대학 교원 — National university faculty — single 호봉 progression 1-33 (Professors, Associate, Assistant Prof.).
